name: ENTRAVISION COMMUNICATIONS CORP
summary: Entravision Communications Corporation is a media and advertising technology company. Its Media segment owns and operates one of the largest groups of Spanish-language television (47 stations) and radio (44 stations) stations in the U.S., targeting Latino audiences. Its Advertising Technology & Services (ATS) segment offers programmatic advertising via Smadex, a demand-side platform using proprietary AI, and Adwake, a performance-based digital marketing agency. Net revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 was $447.6 million.

products.name: Smadex
products.description: Demand-side platform using proprietary AI to automate programmatic media buying for mobile app developers and advertisers globally.

products.name: Adwake
products.description: Performance-based digital marketing agency providing programmatic advertising solutions under the ATS segment.

products.name: Altavision Network
products.description: Spanish-language broadcast network distributed in 19 markets, featuring counter-programming sourced via Multimedios Television partnership.

products.name: WAPA Orlando
products.description: Spanish-language broadcast station in Orlando airing news and entertainment programming from Puerto Rico's WAPA-TV plus local newscasts.

partnerships.description: Affiliation, proxy, and marketing and sales agreements for Univision and UniMs networks; TelevisaUnivision owns ~10% of Entravision common stock.
Agreement to broadcast WAPA Orlando programming produced by Puerto Rico's WAPA-TV on Entravision's Orlando station.
Partnership to source programming for Altavision Network and collaborate on launching a FAST channel on digital platforms.
